bundle.comment: PRIMARY gate = initialGzipBytes: the static entry graph of index.html -> main (what a player downloads to reach the lobby). The three.js/r3f/world stack is a lazy chunk loaded on connect (App.tsx lazy-loads WorldScene; WikiMobs lazy-loads MobModelViewer), so it is NOT counted here. Measured ~268 kB after the codesplit (was ~527 kB when three.js was pinned to the HUD static graph via MobModelViewer); 300/340 kB leaves headroom while still catching a regression that drags three.js back into the initial bundle. totalGzipBytes (initial + async, ~724 kB) is a loose ceiling so the deferred world chunk cannot balloon unbounded. This realises the 'PR 6 codesplit' the previous 525/560 kB total-bundle budget was holding headroom for.

assetPayloadMb.comment: Combined GLB + texture payload limits. Plan target: < 20 MB initial cozy payload.

drawCallTargets.comment: Soft targets for the cozy hero scene. PR 6 will replace Drei `Clone` with instanced merges if exceeded.

mobileFallback.comment: Devices with saveData=true, effectiveType 2g/3g, or deviceMemory<=4 GB are pinned to 'low' (see apps/client/src/world-art/quality.ts).
